calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stacie Nelson, via ZOOM, counsel for David Silvers, Executor.

At the outset, the court confirms that the sole beneficiary has consented and that it plans to take the petition under submission but all of the fees being requested may not be approved. Counsel confirms receipt of Examiner's notes requesting a revised [proposed] order to update the property address as Otsego not Ostego. Counsel reports that a revised order had been submitted. The court confirms that it is currently not in the file. Counsel is advised that the court will search for the order but that she may be asked to submit another copy of the revised order if the court is unable to locate it.

The Accounting Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stacie Nelson for Petitioner, David Silvers

Ms. Nelson spoke of Mr. Silvers' reputable position in his community, and stated the minimum $20,000 bond is appropriate.

The Court granted the petition for letters of administration (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
